name: Verify playback of key videos -- @1.3
fullName: Video playability tests: Verify playback of key videos

steps.name: Given user log in Zonia portal
And user navigates to the "cancer360 - Comprehensive Protocol for Breast Self-Exam" video page
When user initiates the video play
Then the video player is loaded on the page
And the video is actively playing
And the media stream network requests are successful

parameters.name: video_title
parameters.value: cancer360 - Comprehensive Protocol for Breast Self-Exam

items.statusDetails:
